## Verses (7)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | The Lord said to my lord, Be seated at my right hand, till I put all those who are against you under your feet. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | The Lord will send out the rod of your strength from Zion; be king over your haters. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Your people give themselves gladly in the day of your power; like the dew of the morning on the holy mountains is the army of your young men. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | The Lord has made an oath, and will not take it back. You are a priest for ever, after the order of Melchizedek. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | In the day of his wrath kings will be wounded by the Lord at your right hand. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | He will be judge among the nations, the valleys will be full of dead bodies; the head over a great country will be wounded by him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | He will take of the stream by the way; so his head will be lifted up. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
